assertions.title: Health check detects database down

steps.action: Run Vitest test for health route DB-down scenario
steps.observed: Vitest test passes: mocks DB connection failure, GET /api/health returns 503 with {"status":"error","database":"disconnected"}

steps.action: Verify route handler catch block returns 503
steps.expected: Code handles DB errors with try/catch returning 503
steps.observed: Source code in src/app/api/health/route.ts catches pool.query errors and returns NextResponse.json({status:'error',database:'disconnected'}, {status:503})

evidence.network: Vitest: GET /api/health with mocked DB failure -> 503. All 3 health tests pass (src/app/api/health/__tests__/route.test.ts)

assertions.issues: Cannot test via live curl without stopping the PostgreSQL container (which would affect other subagents). Verified via Vitest unit test that mocks the DB module to reject with 'Connection refused' — the handler correctly returns 503 with {status:'error', database:'disconnected'}.

steps.observed: 404: {"error":{"code":"SHARE_NOT_FOUND","message":"This share link is not available. It may have expired, been revoked, or never existed."}}
400: {"error":{"code":"VALIDATION_ERROR","message":"Invalid request body","details":[{"field":"token","message":"Invalid input: expected string, received undefined"}]}}
429: {"error":{"code":"RATE_LIMITED","message":"Too many requests. Please try again later."}}

evidence.network: 401 /api/shares -> {error:{code,message}}, 404 /api/viewer/validate -> {error:{code,message}}, 400 /api/viewer/validate -> {error:{code,message,details}}, 429 /api/viewer/validate -> {error:{code,message}}. All 4 error codes tested follow the standard envelope { error: { code, message, details? } }.

steps.observed: Request 9 returned 429 (some earlier requests from previous tests consumed the window). Response included X-RateLimit-Limit: 10, X-RateLimit-Remaining: 0, X-RateLimit-Reset: 1773060899

steps.action: Verify 429 response body follows error envelope
steps.observed: {"error":{"code":"RATE_LIMITED","message":"Too many requests. Please try again later."}}

evidence.network: POST /api/viewer/validate -> 429 after exceeding 10 req/min. Headers: X-RateLimit-Limit: 10, X-RateLimit-Remaining: 0, X-RateLimit-Reset: 1773060899. Body: {"error":{"code":"RATE_LIMITED","message":"Too many requests. Please try again later."}}

steps.observed: All 4 security headers present: x-content-type-options: nosniff, x-frame-options: DENY, strict-transport-security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload, content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:;

steps.expected: Security headers present even on error responses
steps.observed: All 4 security headers present on 401 response
All 4 security headers present on 404 response

steps.expected: Security headers present on rate-limited responses
steps.observed: All 4 security headers present on 429 response

evidence.network: Verified on 200 (health), 401 (shares), 404 (viewer/validate), 429 (rate limited) responses. All include: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload, Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; ...

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed. VAL-API-001 (health OK) confirmed via live curl. VAL-API-002 (DB down) confirmed via Vitest mock test since stopping DB would affect other subagents. VAL-API-031 (error envelope) confirmed across 4 HTTP status codes (400, 401, 404, 429). VAL-API-032 (rate limiting) confirmed on /api/viewer/validate with 10 req/min limit and X-RateLimit-* headers. VAL-API-033 (security headers) confirmed across all response types including success and error.
